purpose: Build dataset-local generation helpers for anchor-first speech assembly. These datasets teach surface construction patterns only; they do not provide evidence authority.
storage_rule: Download/stage outside git. Ingest into generation lane only after approval receipt.
authority_rule: Conversation datasets may teach glue, turn shape, and readability. They cannot create AW evidence claims, citations, or source authority.

selected_first.reason: Human-written, less noisy, multi-turn daily communication. Good first source for glue/readability patterns. Non-commercial license caveat.
Open-domain conversational responses with emotional context. Useful later for response posture, not evidence. Non-commercial license caveat.
